briefdescription.para: This function demonstrates the usage AXI FIFO It does the following:

para.verbatim: - Set up the output terminal if UART16550 is in the hardware build - Initialize the Axi FIFO Device. - Transmit the data - Receive the data from fifo - Compare the data - Return the result

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the XLlFifo component.
contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: TxSend routine, It will send the requested amount of data at the specified addr.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the XLlFifo component.
is the address where the FIFO stars writing

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure

briefdescription.para: RxReceive routine.It will receive the data from the FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the XLlFifo instance.
is the address where to copy the received data.

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure

detaileddescription.para: This function is the main entry of the Axi FIFO Polling test.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS if tests pass
XST_FAILURE if fails.
